knowledge.content: Our premium apartments start at ₹45 lakhs for 2BHK and ₹75 lakhs for 3BHK. Prices include basic amenities and parking.
EMI options available starting at ₹35,000/month for 20 years at 8.5% interest. We partner with all major banks for home loans.
Booking process: 1) Pay token amount ₹1 lakh, 2) Complete documentation, 3) Pay 20% within 30 days, 4) Balance on possession.
Currently 45 units available across towers A and B. Possession scheduled for December 2025. East and north-facing units available.
Amenities include swimming pool, gym, children's play area, clubhouse, 24/7 security, power backup, and landscaped gardens.
